query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_status (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trust_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  trust_number VARCHAR(100),
  jurisdiction VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('exists_by_number', 'defined', 'activated') DEFAULT 'exists_by_number',
  indenture_complete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  trustees_appointed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  beneficiaries_designated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  initial_funding_complete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  bank_account_opened BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  activation_date DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS trust_status (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  trust_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  trust_number VARCHAR(100),
  jurisdiction VARCHAR(100),
  status ENUM('exists_by_number', 'defined', 'activated') DEFAULT 'exists_by_number',
  indenture_complete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  trustees_appointed BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  beneficiaries_designated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  initial_funding_complete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  bank_account_opened BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  activation_date DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
